stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What are the moments created by the engine thrust, assuming no flight control augmentation?

options.a: Aircraft A = Nose up; Aircraft B = Nose down
options.b: Aircraft A = Nose down; Aircraft B = Nose down
options.c: Aircraft A = Nose up; Aircraft B = Nose up
options.d: Aircraft A = Nose down; Aircraft B = Nose up
